message:
Major proxy improvements

Core:
- Enhanced config handling
- Health check improvements
- Proxy logic refinements
- State management updates

Output:
- Module improvements

Validation:
- Better input validation

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
